title: dinebra paspaloides
intro: Dinebra paspaloides, also known as Needle Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Dinebra paspaloides can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
